params.Description: If a creature card with flying was exiled with CARDNAME's delve ability, CARDNAME has flying. The same is true for first strike, double strike, deathtouch, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, reach, trample, and vigilance.
params.AddKeyword: Flying & First Strike & Double Strike & Deathtouch & Haste & Hexproof & Indestructible & Lifelink & Reach & Trample & Vigilance
